scripts.env:local-dev: npm run validate:units && npm run build:bunny:production && npm run verify:bunny:production
scripts.env:local-unit: npm run validate:units && npm run check:alphabet && npm run build:bunny:integration && npm run verify:bunny:integration
scripts.env:integration: npm run validate:units && npm run check:alphabet && npm run build:bunny:integration && npm run verify:bunny:integration && npm run deploy:integration:dry-run
scripts.env:staging: npm run validate:units && npm run check:alphabet && npm run build:bunny:staging && npm run verify:bunny:staging && npm run deploy:staging:dry-run
scripts.env:production:dry-run: npm run validate:units && npm run check:alphabet && npm run build:bunny:production && npm run verify:bunny:production && npm run deploy:production:dry-run
